summary:
Complete usage guide for all 5 SciSynth interaction modes:
1. Quick Q&A — direct question to ingested index
2. Deep Research (arXiv) — multi-agent pipeline fetching live papers
3. Deep Research (Index) — multi-agent pipeline on ingested corpus
4. arXiv Single Paper Q&A — question about one specific paper
5. arXiv Discovery — search arXiv and answer from top results

Each mode includes exact input syntax, example inputs to copy-paste, expected output format, timing estimates, and tips. Includes a quick reference table and recommended first demo command.
